# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment that pulls our application image from Docker Hub. Use the latest tag so we always get the newest version automatically. This is for our development environment where we want continuous updates without manual intervention.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-app
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-container
        image: docker.io/my-org/my-app:latest
        securityContext:
          privileged: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "500m"
            memory: "1Gi"
          requests:
            cpu: "250m"
            memory: "512Mi"
